about.title: About Me
about.description: Full Stack Software Engineer specialized in FinTech and GovTech. I design and build scalable SaaS systems that process thousands of daily transactions.

background.title: Technical Focus
background.text: My specialty is building Offline-First PWA applications and high-availability systems. I work with Next.js, TypeScript and PostgreSQL to create robust products that solve real business problems.

current.title: Current Projects
current.text: Currently leading the development of Sago One (Enterprise ERP SaaS) and Plenty Market (E-commerce PWA). Both systems handle critical data with AES-256 encryption and advanced multi-tenant schemas.

philosophy.title: My Philosophy
philosophy.text: Clean code, scalable solutions, clear documentation

skills.title: Tech Stack
skills.description: The tools I use to build Sago One and Plenty Market.

services.page_subtitle: I develop complete systems: from Offline-First PWAs to complex government API integrations. Specialized in FinTech SaaS.

projects.page_subtitle: FinTech and E-commerce systems in production. The engineering behind each solution.

cta.title: Need high-level development?

sago_one.title: Sago One
sago_one.label: All-in-One ERP SaaS | POS & FinTech | Next.js 15
sago_one.subtitle: Enterprise ERP and Electronic Invoicing Platform
sago_one.description: All-in-One Enterprise Platform for businesses in Panama. Starting as a DGI-certified electronic invoicing PWA, it now integrates real-time Pro Inventory, an agile touch Point of Sale (POS), and Legal Payroll management. Its offline-first architecture ensures uninterrupted operation in low-connectivity areas.
sago_one.challenge: The challenge was to keep invoicing operational without internet. The solution was implementing an aggressive caching strategy with Service Workers and background synchronization upon reconnection. This allows merchants in rural or unstable areas to continue invoicing without interruptions.

security.title: Bank-Grade Security
security.desc: AES-256 encryption for PAC/DGI credentials, robust authentication, and secure handling of sensitive fiscal data.

database.title: Modular Ecosystem (ERP)
database.desc: Seamless integration between Invoicing v2.0, fast Point of Sale (POS), inventory management with tracking, and legal payroll.

performance.title: Extreme Performance
performance.desc: 99.9% Uptime. React Server Components for optimal rendering and minimal bundle size.

plenty_market.title: Plenty Market
plenty_market.label: International E-commerce | PWA | Complex Logistics
plenty_market.subtitle: PWA E-commerce with Partner Program and Inventory Management
plenty_market.description: Complete modernization from a static site to a high-performance PWA built in Next.js 14 and TypeScript. Integrates a complex logistics system (Partner Program) with real-time inventory management, product variants, and tax-free zones.
plenty_market.challenge: The challenge was migrating a static site to a full e-commerce platform while maintaining fluid UX. We implemented a Partner Program allowing vendors to manage inventory with differentiated tax zones and real-time stock sync.

state.title: Optimized State Management
state.desc: Zustand for lightweight global cart and session handling. State persistence between sessions without overhead.

media.title: Media Optimization
media.desc: Integration with Cloudinary for on-the-fly transformation (WebP/AVIF) and smart Lazy loading.

migration.title: Database Migration
migration.desc: Migration to PostgreSQL (Neon) via Prisma ORM for complex relational data integrity.

facturas.label: Invoices Processed
facturas.desc: Electronic invoices issued through Sago One with DGI compliance.

uptime.label: Guaranteed Uptime
uptime.desc: Availability of production services with serverless architecture.

latency.label: Response Time
latency.desc: Average API latency in critical invoicing operations.

offline.label: Offline Capable
offline.desc: Full offline functionality thanks to Service Workers and PWA.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about my services and methodology.

items.question: What development services does Ángel Nereira offer?
items.answer: I specialize in the development of high-performance Full Stack web applications, SaaS (Software as a Service) platforms for FinTech, integration of electronic invoicing systems, and development of Offline-First PWAs (Progressive Web Apps).

items.question: Do you work with international companies?
items.answer: Yes, I offer software consulting and development services for global clients, with experience working with teams in the United States, Europe, and Latin America.

items.question: What is your main technology stack?
items.answer: My main stack focuses on the React and Next.js ecosystem, using TypeScript for type safety, Tailwind CSS for design, and PostgreSQL (with Prisma/Neon) for scalable databases.

items.question: Do you offer AI integration services?
items.answer: Yes, I develop solutions that integrate Artificial Intelligence models (LLMs like GPT-4, Claude, Gemini) into business workflows for automation and data analysis.
